assertions.title: Peer rows expose trailing ellipsis + play-triangle icons when sidebar open

steps.expected: Peer rows are visible while settings sidebar is open
steps.observed: Peers panel with rows #0/#1/#2 visible alongside open Settings sidebar

steps.action: Verify trailing controls per visible row
steps.expected: Each visible peer row has vertical-ellipsis and play-triangle controls
steps.observed: Accessible trailing controls present as labeled buttons for each row: Peer #0/#1/#2 actions + Open peer #0/#1/#2

steps.action: Attempt real clicks (no force) on all trailing controls for rows #0/#1/#2
steps.expected: All controls are clickable with no pointer interception
steps.observed: All six clicks succeeded (Peer #0 actions/open, Peer #1 actions/open, Peer #2 actions/open); no pointer interception errors

assertions.title: Export Profile flow: sidebar → Export → submit → Backup Ready → Done

steps.action: From open settings sidebar, click Export in Export Profile row
steps.observed: Export Profile modal opened with Export Password + Confirm Password fields

steps.action: Fill matching passwords and submit Export
steps.expected: Flow advances to Export Complete modal
steps.observed: Export Complete modal displayed with Reveal backup string / Copy / Download / Done

steps.action: Click Done on Export Complete modal
steps.expected: Modal closes and sidebar remains visible
steps.observed: Done closed modal; Settings sidebar stayed open with Settings heading and DEVICE PROFILE/GROUP PROFILE sections visible

summary: Retested 2 assertions (VAL-DSH-013, VAL-DSH-031): both passed. Peer-row trailing controls are clickable with sidebar open, and Export Complete → Done closes modal while preserving sidebar visibility.
